TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Togo, title = Togo, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Togo} }

S.FORM: = Togo = Gaga kska Meycow ka Togo, 8 00 N, 1 10 E ka gaga na nniqan. Kana ka knlbangan na o 56,785 sq km(hangan na o Tg126) (knlbanga dxgal o 54,385 sq km, knlbangan qsiya o 2,400 sq km). Kana ka sejiqun o niqan 7,756,937 hiyi. Gaga Lome ka pusu alang paru, jiyax 27 idas 4 ka jiyax skrayan klwaan. Manu ka dxgal Togo ga wada sugan 67.40% ka dxgal qpahan, 4.90% ka dxgal bbuyu, rahuq dxgal do niqan 27.70% na. Bukung klwaan ta sayang o kiya ka Faure Gnassingb√©, pnaah hngkawas2005 idas 5 jiyax 4pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' = Togo = Togo Konghkwo (Kari France: R√©publique Togolaise), splawa dha Togo (Kari France: Togo), kiya ka Tuiwil Afrika uri. Tunarac Togo u msqapah Benin, tudaya u mslutuc Burkina Faso, tuiwil u lmutuc Ghana. Tuhunac u niqan butun bay ratuc ka mkngahu ucilung smquri Cineyawan. Sotu Togo mi knbeyhing bay alang mkbrnux ka Lome. Ri-s Kndadax 15 th prading, Cuminco Budoya, Ingkoku, France u knrmux mkngahu ucilung pbari quli, splawa dha 'Mkngahu Ucilung Quli'. Kngkawas 1856 cida biyax Doicu ka knrmux, kngkawas 1884 daw wada mPawhukwo (Dxral qmlahang) Doicu, splawa 'Togoland', ida lmutuc dhuq kngkawas 1918. Babaw Tumn1 Mccbu Knbeyhing Qnlangan daw, tunarac, tuiwil ddha dxral u wada psnakan Ingkoku mi France na dxral spqlahang; Babaw Tumn2 Mccbu Knbeyhing Qnlangan daw wada mdxra dnurun qmlahang, France u spuda snrwanan biyax UN smquri knkana dxral Ghana mi nFrance Togoland muda dmurun qmlahang, kngkawas 1957 cida u wada pspuwan Ghana ka tuiwil Togo, kngkawas 1960 idas 4 diyax 27 u dhuq ka diyax dnurun qmlahang tunarac Togo, wada dukuricu mi phiyu Togo Konghkwo Kngkawas 2005 idas 4 diyax 24, muda soto seyngkyo ka Togo. Idas 4 diyax 26, dukuricu seyngkyo ingkay ka pkla kari Togo Jnmin ryeynmong hosweynjn Hure Nasinbe ka wada mbiyax. Idas 6 diyax 20, spuda congri Aydmu Kocyo pssli ka seyhu. Kngkawas 2006 idas 9 diyax 20, pssli spuda congri Apoipo ka pusu na seyhu. Ti-ri Togo u wa mniq Tuiwil Afrika, tuhunac u msdalih Benanwan, tuiwil u mslutuc Ghana, tunarac u msqapah Benin, tudaya u mssiyaw Burkina Faso; tndxral qnlhangan u mbbaraw mquri tuhunac mi tudaya. Kcka dxral u ou llbu dwiyaq mi dxral tubaraw, haypa 200-500m; Baumann peak u haypa 986m, kiya ka knbaraw bay dudux dxral qnlhangan; mkngahu ucilung u niqan dxral rucaw, langu qsiya mi bbnaqi dxral. Mniq tudaya u niqan 1 so kobu mbukaw ka mtilux sspriq brnux, tukcka u niqan ddwiyaq; tuhunac u niqan 1 tubaraw brnux mquri qpuran langu cyaw mi dxral rucaw na brnux msdalih ucilung. Togo u mtilux sspriq brnux mi mtilux qyuxan knkkarac, pntingan qsiya quyux kawas u 800-1800 hwami. Jen-ko Knhbrawan hiyi sediq knkana qnlhangan Togo kngkawas 1998 pa ya bay 433 knbkiyan hiyi, Knhbrawan hiyi sediq knkana qnlhangan Togo kngkawas 2007 u dhuq 571 knbkiyan hiyi, knkawas knrana hiyi sediq ryu u ya bay 2.7%, kiya ka knkana qnlangan knrana hiyi sediq ryu knbaraw bay qnlhangna uri. Pndkanan knudus snaw u 60.4 knkawas, pndkanan knudus qridin u 63.9 knkawas. Cung-cyaw Ya bay 51% sediq u smluhay snhiyan ida nanaq tndxral hiya (Utu kyo), niqan 29% ka Kiristo kyo, 20% sediq ka smluhay Muslim (Islam kyo). Kiya uri u, ya bay niqan 2000 hiyi sediq smluhay Bu kyo pnsliyan-SGI Cwangcya Swayhuy,phiyu Togo msblayaq huykwan. Cing-ci Ttiring Ya Sahara keyjayti sqcuqi stman sangyey mi ini kou msrangi na qqpahan pnwalang, kiya ka knkan qnlhangan 65% biyax mpqpah. Koko , kahuy mi wata msupu smmalu ya bay 30% nngalan hbangan cuko. So mndungus ka mehu cida, Togo u malu pndungus diya nanaq mttuku ddiyun dhiya nanaq ka lxayan uuqun, mncuwil niqan ka taxa nniqan alang mqriqu pndungus na uri. Mniq kcka kongyey pa, ana so wada mlih ka neydang rinswanyeyn knkana qnlangan, kiya mi hbaraw ka ppnsung qnlangan, kmari rinswanyeyn kwang dhuq saya u ida kiya ddaun spruwan bay qmita. Togo u nniqan cyuyusing sangyey mi mawyi congsin. Seyhu u mniq qnlangan ginghang mi pssliyan qnlangan pila cicin ka dmkuh balay, spuda knbyaxan mk10 kngkawas, muda pkmalu uuda keyjay, dmudul qnlhangan icil tocu, so nndungus sliqan ka pnkrana nngalan. Ceng-c Wada mstuq ka kkrana mincu Togo. Pnwaya quri mincu dha u ida so rabu hana mntuting mi ini ptkray nina. Mniq kngkawas 2005 idas 2 diyax 5 wada mrdang ka Ayyadma soto, mniq 37 kngkawas ka kcka kndusan dmuwi biyax niya 1tangcu qmlahang Togo dalih 25 kngkawas. Spuda keyngpo, kokoingkay gicyo Fanbar Owatra Nacaba u naka lmutuc phiyun soto, tmawa burah mntxan seyngkyo. Kiya u butayi ka pusa kari laqi Ayyadma soto, tongsinbu bucyo Fure Ayyadma ka mplutuc phiyun soto, kari rnengaw dha u alaw wa mniq qnlhangan icil ka Nacaba. Seyhu u pusa ang plixun qpahan na gicyo ka Nacaba, kiya u subway Ayyamad ka lmutuc mangal qpahun. Fure Ayyadma u, splawa Fure Nasinbe uri, spuda pnkari kana qnlangan, mniq kngkawas 2005 idas 2 diyax psdhuwan phyuwan. Sing-cng cyu-hwa Togo u psnakan 5 beyhing keyjay cyu (Kari France: r√©gions) mi 30 ka sng (pr√©fectures). Sng Tong-sin Togo tyeynsin kolyo ka seyhu Togo tmiyu qpahan huwu qmlahang mi pprngaw tongsyun na kojyo stkuwan qnlhangan. Kngkawas 2008 pusa qnawal ini ddili u hmrinas 7 knbkiyan day. Malu mubung knkana qnlhangan 16 alang mkbrnux mi 60 sngari nniqan alang go cn. Dhuq puting hiyi kngkawas 2009, wada pusa qnawal ini ddili u niqan 28.6 knbkiyan day, mumal dmuwi niya u niqan 17.8 knbkiyan day. Knkana qnlhangan niqan qnawal ddilun sapah u 161 knbkiyan sapah. Ddilun tongsinwang mubung knkana knhbrawan na 85%. Togo u niqan 2 qnawal ddilun tyeynsin yuning kojyo, kiya ka Togo qnawal ddilun tyeynsin kojyo, dmuwi sapah u dhuq 120 knbkiyan, Moov qnawalddilun tyeynsin kojyo, dmuwi niya u 60 knbkiyan sapah. Togo tyeynsin mi CAF√Č sinsi mi tyeynsin kojyo muda qmlahang qpahun wangci wangru. Pnsnakan quri uuda sangwang u niqan ADSL sangwang mi uka wasil sangwang 2 kluwanan. Cyun-su Heytay Togo u muda heytay yiwu, heytay smruwa nanaq 2 kluwanan pnwaya. Heytay yiwu u 2 kngkawas diyax niya.18-25 kngkawas niya u malu musa pusa hangan kana. Kyoiku Seyhu u kawas kawas pila kyoiku u ya bay pndkanan knkana yosang ddiyun 25%. Seyhu u snbeyhing bay qmita snburah pkrana tubaraw kyoiku, Togo u niqan 2 pyasan tubeyhing- Pyasan tubeyhing Lome (Cbiyaw han u splawa Pyasan tubeyhingBenin ha) mi Pyasan tubeyhing Kara. Pnwaya kyoiku u psnakan 1ci kyoiku (Pyasan tutiping), 2 ci kyoiku (Pyasan tukcka), 3 ci kyoiku (Pyasan tubaraw) mi 4 ci kyoiku (Pyasan tubeyhing). Ti-yu Togo mtur boru tuy umniq kngkawas 2005 idas 10 diyax 8 spuda 3-2 wada dha ini baka ka Kangkwo Mincu Konghkwo daw, mniq Qnlangan Pey Afrika cyu nganguc say kcka tu1 qnpringan u wada dha ini baka 23 boru ka Saynekar, rikisising wada cnbu kngkawas 2006 mniq Doicu pnsung Qnlangan Pey. Spuda mniq kngkawas 2005 idas 12 diyax 9 muda mnhdu kujubiki daw, wada psuwan G kumi ka Togo, mntna kumi dha u niqan France, Switzerland mi Hankoku. Mnuda mn3 psasu kumi pnsung, ini usa ana 1 boru ka Togo mi wada ini baka da. Kcka dha tunux mpbtur boru hayo ka wa dmayaw Inggran Cawci Ryeynsay cyotuy Totonamujoc tuy na Adbayo. Kngkawas 2010 idas 1 diyax 9 Togo qnlhangan mtur boru tuy mniq Angora mmusa Afrika Qnlhangan Pey kcka elu u snturung cbuwan kongpu huncu kiya mi 3 hiyi ka mnhuqil mi 8 hiyi ka mangal luqah. Babaw niya daw tndxral Pnsliyan Kapinda Ptrawah pkla kari muda seykining cnbuwan dha. Afrika Pey kwanweyn u mniq mtbiyax pprngaw kari daw hiti balay pkla kari ida muru diyax pnrngawan pnsung boru. Ana hmuya mniq ndan niyi ini qbsiyaq lmawa qnlhangan tuy tbrinah miyah alang ka seyhu Togo, mpsboru tuyyeyn u ida nanaq tumal pnsung boru 'Muda kining mniq ntxan cnbuwan niya wada muda qnlqilan niya'. Bukuy daw Togo tuy u muru pnosa kari seyhu tbrinah miyah qnlhangan.

…ĺańßuq dxgal do niqan **.**% na. bukuŇč klwaan ta sajaŇč o kija ka *au…ĺ…ô gnassiŇčb*, pnaańß ńßŇčkawas**** idas * …üijax *pn…ĺa…üiŇč kmlawa klwaan. ¶inkńßulan sa knita' sa b…ĺbi…ĺu' = togo = togo ja baj niqan **** ńßiji s…ôdiq smluńßaj bu kjo pnslijan-sgi ¶waŇč ¶ja swajńßuj,pńßiju togo msblajaq ńßujkwan. ¶iŇč- ¶i tti…ĺiŇč ja sańßa…ĺa k…ô…üajti sq ¶uqi stman saŇčj…ô mi ini kou ms…ĺaŇči na qqpańßan pnwalaŇč, kija ka knkan qnlńßaŇčan **% bijax mpqpańß. koko , kańßuj mi wata msupu smmalu ja baj **% nŇčalan ńßbaŇčan ¶uko. so mnduŇčus ka m…ôńßu ¶ida, togo u malu pnduŇčus dija nanaq mttuku ddijun dńßija nanaq ka lxajan uuqun, mn ¶uwil niqan ka taxa nniqan alaŇč mq…ĺiqu pnduŇčus na u…ĺi. mniq k ¶ka koŇčj…ô pa, ana so wada mlińß ka n…ôdaŇč …ĺinswanj…ôn knkana qnlaŇčan, kija mi ńßba…ĺaw ka ppnsuŇč qnlaŇčan, kma…ĺi …ĺinswanj…ôn kwaŇč dńßuq saja u ida kija ddaun sp…ĺuwan baj qmita. togo u nniqan ¶jujusiŇč saŇčj…ô mi mawji ¶oŇčsin. s…ôńßu u mniq qnlaŇčan giŇčńßaŇč mi psslijan qnlaŇčan pila ¶i ¶in ka dmkuńß balaj, spuda knbjaxan mk** kŇčkawas, muda pkmalu uuda k…ô…üaj, dmudul qnlńßaŇčan i ¶il to ¶u, so nnduŇčus sliqan ka pnk…ĺana nŇčalan. ¶…ôŇč- ¶ wada mstuq ka kk…ĺana min ¶u togo. pnwaja qu…ĺi min ¶u dńßa u ida so …ĺabu ńßana mntutiŇč mi ini ptk…ĺaj nina. mniq kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax * wada m…ĺdaŇč ka ajjadma soto, mniq ** kŇčkawas ka k ¶ka kndusan dmuwi bijax nija *taŇč ¶u k…ô…üaj ¶ju (ka…ĺi *…ĺan ¶…ô: …ĺ*gions) mi ** ka sŇč (p…ĺ**…ô ¶tu…ĺ…ôs). sŇč toŇč-sin togo tj…ônsin koljo ka s…ôńßu togo tmiju qpańßan ńßuwu qmlańßaŇč mi pp…ĺŇčaw toŇčsjun na ko…üjo stkuwan qnlńßaŇčan. kŇčkawas **** pusa qnawal ini ddili u ńßm…ĺinas * knbkijan daj. malu mubuŇč knkana qnlńßaŇčan ** alaŇč mkb…ĺnux mi ** sŇča…ĺi nniqan alaŇč go ¶n. dńßuq putiŇč ńßiji kŇčkawas ****, wada ** knbkijan sapańß. togo tj…ônsin mi ¶a** sinsi mi tj…ônsin ko…üjo muda qmlańßaŇč qpańßun waŇč ¶i waŇč…ĺu. pnsnakan qu…ĺi uuda saŇčwaŇč u niqan adsl saŇčwaŇč mi uka wasil saŇčwaŇč * kluwanan. ¶jun-su ńß…ôtaj togo u muda ńß…ôtaj jiwu, ńß…ôtaj sm…ĺuwa nanaq * kluwanan pnwaja. ńß…ôtaj jiwu u * kŇčkawas dijax nija.**-** kŇčkawas nija u malu musa pusa ńßaŇčan kana. kjoiku s…ôńßu u kawas kawas pila kjoiku u ja baj pndkanan knkana josaŇč ddijun **%. s…ôńßu u snb…ôńßiŇč baj qmita snbu…ĺańß pk…ĺana tuba…ĺaw kjoiku, togo u niqan * pjasan tub…ôńßiŇč- pjasan tub…ôńßiŇč lom…ô ( ¶bijaw ńßan u splawa pjasan tub…ôńßiŇčb…ônin ńßa) mi pjasan tub…ôńßiŇč ka…ĺa. pnwaja kjoiku u psnakan * ¶i kjoiku (pjasan tutipiŇč), * ¶i kjoiku (pjasan tuk ¶ka), * ¶i kjoiku (pjasan tuba…ĺaw) mi * ¶i kjoiku (pjasan tub…ôńßiŇč). ti-ju togo mtu…ĺ bo…ĺu tuj umniq kŇčkawas **** idas ** dijax * spuda *-* wada dńßa ini baka ka kaŇčkwo min ¶u koŇčńßkwo daw, mniq qnlaŇčan p…ô a*…ĺika ¶ju ŇčaŇču ¶ saj k ¶ka tu* qnp…ĺiŇčan u wada dńßa ini baka ** bo…ĺu ka sajn…ôka…ĺ, …ĺikisisiŇč wada ¶nbu kŇčkawas **** mniq doi ¶u pnsuŇč qnlaŇčan p…ô. spuda mniq kŇčkawas **** idas ** dijax * muda mnńßdu ku…üubiki daw, wada psuwan g kumi ka togo, mntna kumi dńßa u niqan *…ĺan ¶…ô, swit*…ô…ĺland mi ńßankoku. mnuda mn* psasu kumi pnsuŇč, ini usa ana * bo…ĺu ka togo mi wada ini baka da. k ¶ka dńßa tunux mpbtu…ĺ bo…ĺu ńßajo ka wa dmajaw iŇčg…ĺan ¶aw ¶i …ĺj…ônsaj ¶jotuj totonamu…üo ¶ tuj na adbajo. kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax * togo qnlńßaŇčan mtu…ĺ bo…ĺu tuj mniq aŇčo…ĺa mmusa a*…ĺika qnlńßaŇčan p…ô k ¶ka …ôlu u sntu…ĺuŇč ¶buwan koŇčpu ńßun ¶u kija mi * ńßiji ka mnńßuqil mi * ńßiji ka maŇčal luqańß. babaw nija daw tndx…ĺal pnslijan kapinda pt…ĺawańß pkla ka…ĺi muda s…ôkiniŇč ¶nbuwan dńßa. a*…ĺika p…ô kwanw…ôn u mniq mtbijax pp…ĺŇčaw ka…ĺi daw ńßiti balaj pkla ka…ĺi ida mu…ĺu dijax pn…ĺŇčawan pnsuŇč bo…ĺu. ana ńßmuja mniq ndan niji ini qbsijaq lmawa qnlńßaŇčan tuj tb…ĺinańß mijańß alaŇč ka s…ôńßu togo, mpsbo…ĺu tujj…ôn u ida nanaq tumal pnsuŇč bo…ĺu 'muda kiniŇč mniq ntxan ¶nbuwan nija wada muda qnlqilan nija'. bukuj daw togo tuj u mu…ĺu pnosa ka…ĺi s…ôńßu tb…ĺinańß mijańß qnlńßaŇčan.
S.FORM: = Togo = Gaga kska Meycow ka Togo, 8 00 N, 1 10 E ka gaga na nniqan. Kana ka knlbangan na o 56,785 sq km(hangan na o Tg126) (knlbanga dxgal o 54,385 sq km, knlbangan qsiya o 2,400 sq km). Kana ka sejiqun o niqan 7,756,937 hiyi. Gaga Lome ka pusu alang paru, jiyax 27 idas 4 ka jiyax skrayan klwaan. Manu ka dxgal Togo ga wada sugan 67.40% ka dxgal qpahan, 4.90% ka dxgal bbuyu, rahuq dxgal do niqan 27.70% na. Bukung klwaan ta sayang o kiya ka Faure Gnassingb√©, pnaah hngkawas2005 idas 5 jiyax 4pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' = Togo = Togo Konghkwo (Kari France: R√©publique Togolaise), splawa dha Togo (Kari France: Togo), kiya ka Tuiwil Afrika uri. Tunarac Togo u msqapah Benin, tudaya u mslutuc Burkina Faso, tuiwil u lmutuc Ghana. Tuhunac u niqan butun bay ratuc ka mkngahu ucilung smquri Cineyawan. Sotu Togo mi knbeyhing bay alang mkbrnux ka Lome. Ri-s Kndadax 15 th prading, Cuminco Budoya, Ingkoku, France u knrmux mkngahu ucilung pbari quli, splawa dha 'Mkngahu Ucilung Quli'. Kngkawas 1856 cida biyax Doicu ka knrmux, kngkawas 1884 daw wada mPawhukwo (Dxral qmlahang) Doicu, splawa 'Togoland', ida lmutuc dhuq kngkawas 1918. Babaw Tumn1 Mccbu Knbeyhing Qnlangan daw, tunarac, tuiwil ddha dxral u wada psnakan Ingkoku mi France na dxral spqlahang; Babaw Tumn2 Mccbu Knbeyhing Qnlangan daw wada mdxra dnurun qmlahang, France u spuda snrwanan biyax UN smquri knkana dxral Ghana mi nFrance Togoland muda dmurun qmlahang, kngkawas 1957 cida u wada pspuwan Ghana ka tuiwil Togo, kngkawas 1960 idas 4 diyax 27 u dhuq ka diyax dnurun qmlahang tunarac Togo, wada dukuricu mi phiyu Togo Konghkwo Kngkawas 2005 idas 4 diyax 24, muda soto seyngkyo ka Togo. Idas 4 diyax 26, dukuricu seyngkyo ingkay ka pkla kari Togo Jnmin ryeynmong hosweynjn Hure Nasinbe ka wada mbiyax. Idas 6 diyax 20, spuda congri Aydmu Kocyo pssli ka seyhu. Kngkawas 2006 idas 9 diyax 20, pssli spuda congri Apoipo ka pusu na seyhu. Ti-ri Togo u wa mniq Tuiwil Afrika, tuhunac u msdalih Benanwan, tuiwil u mslutuc Ghana, tunarac u msqapah Benin, tudaya u mssiyaw Burkina Faso; tndxral qnlhangan u mbbaraw mquri tuhunac mi tudaya. Kcka dxral u ou llbu dwiyaq mi dxral tubaraw, haypa 200-500m; Baumann peak u haypa 986m, kiya ka knbaraw bay dudux dxral qnlhangan; mkngahu ucilung u niqan dxral rucaw, langu qsiya mi bbnaqi dxral. Mniq tudaya u niqan 1 so kobu mbukaw ka mtilux sspriq brnux, tukcka u niqan ddwiyaq; tuhunac u niqan 1 tubaraw brnux mquri qpuran langu cyaw mi dxral rucaw na brnux msdalih ucilung. Togo u mtilux sspriq brnux mi mtilux qyuxan knkkarac, pntingan qsiya quyux kawas u 800-1800 hwami. Jen-ko Knhbrawan hiyi sediq knkana qnlhangan Togo kngkawas 1998 pa ya bay 433 knbkiyan hiyi, Knhbrawan hiyi sediq knkana qnlhangan Togo kngkawas 2007 u dhuq 571 knbkiyan hiyi, knkawas knrana hiyi sediq ryu u ya bay 2.7%, kiya ka knkana qnlangan knrana hiyi sediq ryu knbaraw bay qnlhangna uri. Pndkanan knudus snaw u 60.4 knkawas, pndkanan knudus qridin u 63.9 knkawas. Cung-cyaw Ya bay 51% sediq u smluhay snhiyan ida nanaq tndxral hiya (Utu kyo), niqan 29% ka Kiristo kyo, 20% sediq ka smluhay Muslim (Islam kyo). Kiya uri u, ya bay niqan 2000 hiyi sediq smluhay Bu kyo pnsliyan-SGI Cwangcya Swayhuy,phiyu Togo msblayaq huykwan. Cing-ci Ttiring Ya Sahara keyjayti sqcuqi stman sangyey mi ini kou msrangi na qqpahan pnwalang, kiya ka knkan qnlhangan 65% biyax mpqpah. Koko , kahuy mi wata msupu smmalu ya bay 30% nngalan hbangan cuko. So mndungus ka mehu cida, Togo u malu pndungus diya nanaq mttuku ddiyun dhiya nanaq ka lxayan uuqun, mncuwil niqan ka taxa nniqan alang mqriqu pndungus na uri. Mniq kcka kongyey pa, ana so wada mlih ka neydang rinswanyeyn knkana qnlangan, kiya mi hbaraw ka ppnsung qnlangan, kmari rinswanyeyn kwang dhuq saya u ida kiya ddaun spruwan bay qmita. Togo u nniqan cyuyusing sangyey mi mawyi congsin. Seyhu u mniq qnlangan ginghang mi pssliyan qnlangan pila cicin ka dmkuh balay, spuda knbyaxan mk10 kngkawas, muda pkmalu uuda keyjay, dmudul qnlhangan icil tocu, so nndungus sliqan ka pnkrana nngalan. Ceng-c Wada mstuq ka kkrana mincu Togo. Pnwaya quri mincu dha u ida so rabu hana mntuting mi ini ptkray nina. Mniq kngkawas 2005 idas 2 diyax 5 wada mrdang ka Ayyadma soto, mniq 37 kngkawas ka kcka kndusan dmuwi biyax niya 1tangcu qmlahang Togo dalih 25 kngkawas. Spuda keyngpo, kokoingkay gicyo Fanbar Owatra Nacaba u naka lmutuc phiyun soto, tmawa burah mntxan seyngkyo. Kiya u butayi ka pusa kari laqi Ayyadma soto, tongsinbu bucyo Fure Ayyadma ka mplutuc phiyun soto, kari rnengaw dha u alaw wa mniq qnlhangan icil ka Nacaba. Seyhu u pusa ang plixun qpahan na gicyo ka Nacaba, kiya u subway Ayyamad ka lmutuc mangal qpahun. Fure Ayyadma u, splawa Fure Nasinbe uri, spuda pnkari kana qnlangan, mniq kngkawas 2005 idas 2 diyax psdhuwan phyuwan. Sing-cng cyu-hwa Togo u psnakan 5 beyhing keyjay cyu (Kari France: r√©gions) mi 30 ka sng (pr√©fectures). Sng Tong-sin Togo tyeynsin kolyo ka seyhu Togo tmiyu qpahan huwu qmlahang mi pprngaw tongsyun na kojyo stkuwan qnlhangan. Kngkawas 2008 pusa qnawal ini ddili u hmrinas 7 knbkiyan day. Malu mubung knkana qnlhangan 16 alang mkbrnux mi 60 sngari nniqan alang go cn. Dhuq puting hiyi kngkawas 2009, wada pusa qnawal ini ddili u niqan 28.6 knbkiyan day, mumal dmuwi niya u niqan 17.8 knbkiyan day. Knkana qnlhangan niqan qnawal ddilun sapah u 161 knbkiyan sapah. Ddilun tongsinwang mubung knkana knhbrawan na 85%. Togo u niqan 2 qnawal ddilun tyeynsin yuning kojyo, kiya ka Togo qnawal ddilun tyeynsin kojyo, dmuwi sapah u dhuq 120 knbkiyan, Moov qnawalddilun tyeynsin kojyo, dmuwi niya u 60 knbkiyan sapah. Togo tyeynsin mi CAF√Č sinsi mi tyeynsin kojyo muda qmlahang qpahun wangci wangru. Pnsnakan quri uuda sangwang u niqan ADSL sangwang mi uka wasil sangwang 2 kluwanan. Cyun-su Heytay Togo u muda heytay yiwu, heytay smruwa nanaq 2 kluwanan pnwaya. Heytay yiwu u 2 kngkawas diyax niya.18-25 kngkawas niya u malu musa pusa hangan kana. Kyoiku Seyhu u kawas kawas pila kyoiku u ya bay pndkanan knkana yosang ddiyun 25%. Seyhu u snbeyhing bay qmita snburah pkrana tubaraw kyoiku, Togo u niqan 2 pyasan tubeyhing- Pyasan tubeyhing Lome (Cbiyaw han u splawa Pyasan tubeyhingBenin ha) mi Pyasan tubeyhing Kara. Pnwaya kyoiku u psnakan 1ci kyoiku (Pyasan tutiping), 2 ci kyoiku (Pyasan tukcka), 3 ci kyoiku (Pyasan tubaraw) mi 4 ci kyoiku (Pyasan tubeyhing). Ti-yu Togo mtur boru tuy umniq kngkawas 2005 idas 10 diyax 8 spuda 3-2 wada dha ini baka ka Kangkwo Mincu Konghkwo daw, mniq Qnlangan Pey Afrika cyu nganguc say kcka tu1 qnpringan u wada dha ini baka 23 boru ka Saynekar, rikisising wada cnbu kngkawas 2006 mniq Doicu pnsung Qnlangan Pey. Spuda mniq kngkawas 2005 idas 12 diyax 9 muda mnhdu kujubiki daw, wada psuwan G kumi ka Togo, mntna kumi dha u niqan France, Switzerland mi Hankoku. Mnuda mn3 psasu kumi pnsung, ini usa ana 1 boru ka Togo mi wada ini baka da. Kcka dha tunux mpbtur boru hayo ka wa dmayaw Inggran Cawci Ryeynsay cyotuy Totonamujoc tuy na Adbayo. Kngkawas 2010 idas 1 diyax 9 Togo qnlhangan mtur boru tuy mniq Angora mmusa Afrika Qnlhangan Pey kcka elu u snturung cbuwan kongpu huncu kiya mi 3 hiyi ka mnhuqil mi 8 hiyi ka mangal luqah. Babaw niya daw tndxral Pnsliyan Kapinda Ptrawah pkla kari muda seykining cnbuwan dha. Afrika Pey kwanweyn u mniq mtbiyax pprngaw kari daw hiti balay pkla kari ida muru diyax pnrngawan pnsung boru. Ana hmuya mniq ndan niyi ini qbsiyaq lmawa qnlhangan tuy tbrinah miyah alang ka seyhu Togo, mpsboru tuyyeyn u ida nanaq tumal pnsung boru 'Muda kining mniq ntxan cnbuwan niya wada muda qnlqilan niya'. Bukuy daw Togo tuy u muru pnosa kari seyhu tbrinah miyah qnlhangan.
S.PHON: = togo = gaga kska m…ô ¶ow ka togo, * ** n, * ** …ô ka gaga na nniqan. kana ka knlbaŇčan na o **,*** sq km(ńßaŇčan na o tg***) (knlbaŇča dxgal o **,*** sq km, knlbaŇčan qsija o *,*** sq km). kana ka s…ô…üiqun o niqan *,***,*** ńßiji. gaga lom…ô ka pusu alaŇč pa…ĺu, …üijax ** idas * ka …üijax sk…ĺajan klwaan. manu ka dxgal togo ga wada sugan **.**% ka dxgal qpańßan, *.**% ka dxgal bbuju, …ĺańßuq dxgal do niqan **.**% na. bukuŇč klwaan ta sajaŇč o kija ka *au…ĺ…ô gnassiŇčb*, pnaańß ńßŇčkawas**** idas * …üijax *pn…ĺa…üiŇč kmlawa klwaan. ¶inkńßulan sa knita' sa b…ĺbi…ĺu' = togo = togo qqpańßan pnwalaŇč, kija ka knkan qnlńßaŇčan **% bijax mpqpańß. koko , kańßuj mi wata msupu smmalu ja baj **% nŇčalan ńßbaŇčan ¶uko. so mnduŇčus ka m…ôńßu ¶ida, togo u malu pnduŇčus dija nanaq mttuku ¶i ¶in ka dmkuńß balaj, spuda knbjaxan mk** kŇčkawas, muda pkmalu uuda k…ô…üaj, dmudul qnlńßaŇčan i ¶il to ¶u, so nnduŇčus sliqan ka pnk…ĺana nŇčalan. ¶…ôŇč- ¶ wada mstuq ka kk…ĺana min ¶u togo. pnwaja qu…ĺi min ¶u dńßa u ida so …ĺabu ńßana mntutiŇč mi ini ptk…ĺaj nina. mniq kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax * wada m…ĺdaŇč ka ajjadma soto, mniq ** kŇčkawas ka k ¶ka kndusan dmuwi bijax nija *taŇč ¶u k…ô…üaj ¶ju (ka…ĺi *…ĺan ¶…ô: …ĺ*gions) mi ** ka sŇč (p…ĺ**…ô ¶tu…ĺ…ôs). sŇč toŇč-sin togo tj…ônsin koljo ka s…ôńßu togo tmiju qpańßan ńßuwu qmlańßaŇč mi pp…ĺŇčaw toŇčsjun na ko…üjo stkuwan kjoiku u ja baj pndkanan knkana josaŇč ddijun **%. s…ôńßu u snb…ôńßiŇč baj qmita snbu…ĺańß pk…ĺana tuba…ĺaw kjoiku, togo u niqan * pjasan tub…ôńßiŇč- pjasan tub…ôńßiŇč lom…ô ( ¶bijaw ńßan u splawa tub…ôńßiŇč). ti-ju togo mtu…ĺ bo…ĺu tuj umniq kŇčkawas **** idas ** dijax * spuda *-* wada dńßa ini baka ka kaŇčkwo min ¶u koŇčńßkwo daw, mniq qnlaŇčan p…ô a*…ĺika ¶ju ŇčaŇču ¶ saj k ¶ka tu*
